NO RUN FIRST INNING (NRFI)
NRFI = NO RUN SCORED BY EITHER TEAM IN THE 1ST INNING
MODEL: STARTER ERA/FIP × TEAM 1ST-INN SCORING RATE × PARK FACTOR
ELITE ≥70% · GOOD 62-70% · FAIR 55-62% · FADE <55%

ACTIVE NHL BETS
NHL MODEL ARCHITECTURE
MONTE CARLO
Poisson 5K sims. xGF/60 + GSAx + PP/PK. Home ice advantage baked in.
BAYESIAN
Beta-binomial posterior. Series history + GSAx prior. Updates each game.
ELO + MOV
K=20. Margin-of-victory multiplier. HockeyViz xGF calibration.
MONEYPUCK
HDCF%, xGF%, GSAx, PP xG vs PK xGA. Series-adjusted.
MARKOV
Win streak momentum. Hot/cold detection via HMM smoothing.
RF ENSEMBLE
Random Forest feature blend. Goalie performance × matchup × fatigue.
WEIGHTS
MONTE CARLO50%
BAYESIAN20%
ELO30%
MODEL FACTORS
CORSI FOR %
Shot attempt % at even strength. Weight: HIGH
xG DIFFERENTIAL
Expected goals for minus against. Weight: HIGH
GSAx
Goals saved above expected. Weight: HIGH
PDO
SV% + SH% regression indicator. Weight: MED
PP EFFICIENCY
Power play % vs PK%. Weight: MED
H/A SPLITS
Home ice advantage adjustment. Weight: LOW

ACTIVE NBA BETS
NBA MODEL ARCHITECTURE
MONTE CARLO
5K sims. Net Rating + Pace + eFG% + HFA. ESPN odds calibration.
BAYESIAN
Beta-binomial posterior. Series + rest day adjustments.
ELO + MOV
K=20. Margin-of-victory multiplier. BBRef advanced stats.
MODEL FACTORS
NET RATING
Points per 100 possessions differential. Weight: HIGH
PACE-ADJ eFG%
Effective FG% adjusted for pace. Weight: HIGH
DEFENSIVE RTG
Points allowed per 100 possessions. Weight: HIGH
TO%
Turnover rate — efficiency indicator. Weight: MED
FT RATE
Free throw attempt rate. Weight: MED
REST ADVANTAGE
Days rest differential between teams. Weight: LOW

// DRIVER STANDINGS
// CONSTRUCTOR STANDINGS
F1 ANALYSIS & STATS
F1 MODEL ARCHITECTURE
QUALIFYING PACE
Qualifying lap delta vs field average. Strong predictor of race win.
ELO RATING
Driver ELO adjusted for team performance and circuit history.
STRATEGY SIM
Pit stop optimization Monte Carlo. Tyre compound × weather × safety car.
CIRCUIT DNA
Track-specific performance coefficients. High downforce vs power circuits.
CONSTRUCTOR FORM
Rolling 5-race team reliability and upgrade trajectory index.
WEATHER ADJ
Rain probability × wet/dry performance differential per driver.
// MODEL FACTORS
QUALIFYING
Grid position × track overtaking difficulty. Weight: HIGH
DRIVER ELO
Multi-season performance rating. Weight: HIGH
STRATEGY
Pit window + tyre delta simulation. Weight: MED
F1 ENGINE CONFIG
Qualifying Weight: 40%
ELO Weight: 30%
Strategy Weight: 20%
Weather Weight: 10%
